summary: Added the Agent Party to each lane Overview so selected money paths show their bound bot portraits, readiness, gate pressure, thread id, top ask, and local COM/Q/PATH controls.

pattern_notes: Agent UX benefits from transparency, control, status communication, and recovery cues rather than opaque automation.
Agent management dashboards commonly pair avatars with status, task counts, last activity, and action controls.
Multi-agent dashboards make ownership and real-time status visible so operators are not forced to reconstruct work from separate chats.
Game HUD and party-roster patterns keep essential character state visible inside the core loop.

data_contract: agentPartyRecords(lane) reuses botCommandRecords(), laneAgents(lane), and laneDispatchSuggestion(lane).
renderAgentParty(lane) appears in Overview after the Milestone Runway.
The panel reads existing snapshot agents, lane bindings, dispatch suggestions, staged drafts, agent visuals, and lane counts.
COM and PATH are local detail navigation; Q only stages a browser-local command draft and rerenders the selected lane Overview.
ui_notes: Agent Party cards use generated agent portraits from agent-visuals.json when mapped.
Cards show readiness meter, pressure rail, level, gates, pending review, urgency, thread id, and staged state.
Mobile layout collapses summary and stat grids to two columns while keeping action buttons touch-friendly.

red.result: Expected failure before implementation: panel false, cards 0, avatars 0, meters 0, actions [], stagedCards 0, errors []

green.result: ok true; panel true; cards 1; avatars 1; meters 1; summary 4; actions [comms,path,queue]; Q changed queue label to OK and stagedCards to 1; PATH opened Path Map; COM opened Comms; no clipped text or console errors.

responsive: phone 390: ok true, cards 1, actions 3, summaryColumns 2, statColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
tablet 820: ok true, cards 1, actions 3, summaryColumns 2, statColumns 2, pageOverflow false, clipped []
desktop 1280: ok true, cards 1, actions 3, summaryColumns 4, statColumns 4, pageOverflow false, clipped []
wide 1600: ok true, cards 1, actions 3, summaryColumns 4, statColumns 4, pageOverflow false, clipped []
static: ASCII verified for web/index.html, web/app.js, web/styles.css, web/README.md

next_actions: Add lane-party animation skins that vary by minigame family.
Add optional local focus cycling for lanes with multiple bots.
Generate additional expansion portraits and connect spare agents as new lanes are created.
